languages.text: "Это будет сложно объяснить, но мы находимся во временной петле".
"It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."
languages.original_text: "Это будет сложно объяснить, но мы находимся во временной петле".

traits.locale_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."
"It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."
"It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

languages.text: “解释起来有点费劲，简言之：我们被困在时间循环里了。”
languages.original_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: “解释起来有点费劲，简言之：我们被困在时间循环里了。”

languages.text: « C'est difficile à expliquer, mais nous sommes prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle. »
languages.original_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: « C'est difficile à expliquer, mais nous sommes prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle. »

languages.text: "Açıklaması zor ama bir zaman döngüsünün içindeyiz."
languages.original_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: "Açıklaması zor ama bir zaman döngüsünün içindeyiz."

languages.text: «Será difícil de explicar, pero estamos en un bucle temporal».
languages.original_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: «Será difícil de explicar, pero estamos en un bucle temporal».

languages.text: "Das ist schwer zu erklären, aber wir sind in einer Zeitschleife."
languages.original_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist schwer zu erklären, aber wir sind in einer Zeitschleife."

languages.text: 「説明するのは難しいですが、私たちはタイムループの中にいます」
languages.original_text: "It will be difficult to explain, but we are in a time loop."

traits.locale_text: 「説明するのは難しいですが、私たちはタイムループの中にいます」
